2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX
26 - 28 Jun 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 34
Date 27 June 2026
Time 18:20
Title Decision - Qualifying SC2-SC1 Times
Description Decision - Qualifying SC2-SC1 Times

Felix Holter Loïc Bacquelaine
Pedro Lamy Wilhelm Singer

 
 
2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX 
26 – 28 June 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 34 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  27 June 2026 
 
        Time  18:20 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Qualifying 
  
Fact The F1 cars below exceeded the 1:12.0 time limit between the Safety Car lines. 
 
No. Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time
